title: tordylium aegyptiacum var. aegyptiacum
intro: Tordylium aegyptiacum var. aegyptiacum, also known as Egyptian Wild Celery, is a plant species within the family Apiaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and diuretic effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving digestive issues, and alleviating respiratory problems. Herbal preparations of Tordylium aegyptiacum var. aegyptiacum include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various ailments.
